ESGF search services

esg_query()

Query CMIP6 data using ESGF search RESTful API

esgf_query()

Legacy-compatible CMIP6 query wrapper using ESGF search RESTful API

esg_result()

Create empty query result object

EsgDataset

Remote NetCDF Dataset Access via OPeNDAP

FileDownloader

General Purpose File Downloader

Solr date helpers

solr_date()

Parse a Solr date, Date Math expression, or range

is.solr_date()

Check whether an object is a parsed Solr date

CMIP6 Index

Build CMIP6 output index

esgf_query()

Legacy-compatible CMIP6 query wrapper using ESGF search RESTful API

init_cmip6_index()

Build CMIP6 experiment output file index

load_cmip6_index()

Load previously stored CMIP6 experiment output file index

set_cmip6_index()

Set CMIP6 index

data_node_status()

Get status of data nodes which store CMIP6 output

CMIP6 Output

Manage CMIP6 output files

summary_database()

Summary CMIP6 model output file status

Data extraction

Extract CMIP6 data based on EPW

match_coord()

Match coordinates of input EPW in the CMIP6 output file database

extract_data()

Extract data

Create future EPWs

morphing_epw()

Morphing EPW weather variables

future_epw()

Create future EPW files using morphed data

epwshiftr Options

epwshiftr epwshiftr-package

epwshiftr: Create future EnergyPlus Weather files using CMIP6 data

get_data_dir()

Get the path of directory where epwshiftr data is stored
